subcodes.first_line: Glorified art Thou, O Lord of all beings and King of the throne and earth! I beseech Thee by the Name through which the trumpet blast was sounded [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحانک یا مالک الوری و ملیک العرش و الثری اسئلک بالاسم الذی به نفخ فی الصور
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for steadfastness; obedience, @prayer for spiritual recognition, @apocalyptic imagery
